About the Project

Grih Imperial – Phase 1

Grih Builders & Developers Pvt. Ltd. proudly presents Grih Imperial – Phase 1, a premium villa township on Faizabad Road, behind Break Point Dhaba, Lucknow. An exclusive community of 90 premium villas, thoughtfully designed with modern architecture and world-class amenities.

Experience luxurious living within a secure, gated township where contemporary design meets Vaastu-compliant planning. Wide 25-foot internal roads, prime connectivity on Faizabad Road, and a fully compliant land parcel converted under Sections 143/80 make this one of the most credible villa projects in Lucknow.

Whether you're looking for a spacious 2 BHK starting at ₹48 Lakhs or a grand 3 BHK up to ₹72 Lakhs, Grih Imperial offers the perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and security. Up to 80% home loan financing is available, making your dream home within easy reach.

Book your site visit today and take the first step towards your dream home.

Why Choose This Project

Project Highlights

Municipal Corporation Limits

Located within Municipal Corporation limits — ensuring access to all civic amenities, infrastructure, and legal protections.

Land Converted — Sec. 143/80

Land fully converted under Sections 143/80 — complete legal clarity and peace of mind from day one of your investment.

Up to 80% Home Loan

Up to 80% home loan finance available from leading banks — making your dream villa more accessible and affordable.

Gated Community

A fully gated township with controlled entry and exit — a secure, private environment for you and your family.

24×7 Security

Round-the-clock security with surveillance and trained personnel — ensuring complete safety for every resident at all times.

25-Foot Wide Internal Roads

Generously wide 25-foot internal roads ensure smooth traffic movement, easy parking, and a spacious community feel.

Prime — Faizabad Road

Situated on Faizabad Road — one of Lucknow's high-growth corridors with excellent connectivity to the city's key landmarks.

Contemporary Villa Designs

Modern, stylish villa architecture with thoughtful layouts — combining aesthetics with practical, family-friendly spaces.

Vaastu-Compliant Homes

All villas are Vaastu-compliant, designed in harmony with traditional principles to bring positive energy and well-being.

Peaceful & Secure Living

A tranquil, well-planned community designed for peaceful living — away from the bustle yet connected to everything you need.

Choose Your Home

Villa Options & Pricing

Four thoughtfully designed villa configurations to suit every family. PLC (Preferential Location Charges) applicable for corner units.
